title: tectaria moorei
intro: Tectaria moorei, also known as the 'New Caledonian shield fern', is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Tectaria moorei include the potential treatment of various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as an antiseptic and astringent. The herbal preparations of Tectaria moorei include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and derive its health benefits.
